## ai-quality-loops Verification

ID: `test-scope:ai-quality-loops-verification`

Narrow default verification commands for repo-local changes; prefer more specific tests when the task identifies them.

- command: `npm run verify:session`
  purpose: Repo-local verification candidate.

- command: `npm run test`
  purpose: Repo-local verification candidate.

  purpose: Repo-local verification candidate.

## AIQL Verification

ID: `test-scope:aiql-verification`

Repo-native TypeScript, Vitest, and agent-surface checks for public review utility changes.

- command: `pnpm verify:session`
  purpose: Run the repo verification wrapper for non-trivial changes.

- command: `pnpm test`
  purpose: Run Vitest directly for focused behavior changes.

Verifies:
- `component:review-workflows`
- `component:structured-results`
- `component:vision-review`
- `workflow:run-review`
